title: Feature Explainer Example
subtitle: Explain how a product or technical feature works.

sections.heading: Feature Explainer in use
sections.body: This explainer documents a fictional feature: offline artifact export for review. It includes the user problem, mechanism, edge cases, and examples.

cards.title: User problem
cards.body: Reviewers need to inspect generated content without running the VPK app or reconstructing source prompts.

cards.title: Mechanism
cards.body: A structured payload renders to a standalone HTML file with embedded styles, fonts, and scripts.

cards.title: Boundary
cards.body: The renderer is not a CMS. It accepts trusted local payloads and escapes ordinary source text.

steps.title: Choose a template
steps.body: The template sets the reading pattern: report, deck, diagram, math page, editor, or prototype.

steps.title: Fill structured sections
steps.body: Sections can include cards, steps, code, tables, diagrams, controls, slides, and trusted local HTML.

steps.title: Render and check
steps.body: The static checker verifies shell markers, embedded theme support, and missing placeholder patterns.

rows: Fail rather than falling back to a generic page
